external_catalog.name: CIC-IDS2017
external_catalog.source: Canadian Institute for Cybersecurity, University of New Brunswick
external_catalog.format: PCAP and CICFlowMeter CSV flow data
external_catalog.notes: Contains benign traffic plus FTP/SSH brute force, DoS, Heartbleed, web attacks, infiltration, botnet, DDoS, and port scan scenarios.

external_catalog.name: UNSW-NB15
external_catalog.format: CSV network-flow features with binary and attack-category labels
external_catalog.notes: Contains normal traffic and Fuzzers, Analysis, Backdoors, DoS, Exploits, Generic, Reconnaissance, Shellcode, and Worms.

external_catalog.name: UNSW-NB15 Hugging Face mirror
external_catalog.notes: Useful when the Python datasets package is installed. This terminal can still import downloaded CSV files directly.
